message:

@@ -0,0 +1,203 @@
+# Exhaustive Unit-Test Matrix for FS/Process/Signal Correctness
+
+**Bead**: `asupersync-2oh2u.3.9` ([T3.9])
+**Generated by**: SapphireHill (claude-code / opus-4.6)
+**Date**: 2026-03-04
+**Dependencies**: T3.3 (advanced FS), T3.5 (signal contracts), T3.6 (cancel-safe integration), T3.7 (conformance/faults)
+**Purpose**: Map unit-test coverage exhaustively to each T3 implementation bead with boundary, error, and cancellation assertions. Define coverage thresholds and diagnostic requirements for CI enforcement.
+
+---
+
+## 1. Scope
+
+This matrix catalogs all T3-related test evidence, maps it to implementation beads and coverage categories, identifies remaining gaps, and defines enforcement thresholds.
+
+### 1.1 Coverage Categories
+
+| Category | Code | Description |
+|----------|------|-------------|
+| Happy Path | HP | Normal success paths |
+| Edge Case | EC | Boundary conditions, empty inputs, large values |
+| Error Path | EP | Expected failure modes, invalid inputs |
+| Cancellation | CX | Cancel-safety, drop behavior, race conditions |
+| Determinism | DT | Reproducibility, idempotency, ordering |
+| Integration | IX | Cross-module interaction (fs+process, signal+shutdown) |
+
+### 1.2 Implementation Beads Covered
+
+| Bead | Title | Primary Domain |
+|------|-------|---------------|
+| T3.3 | Advanced filesystem operations and atomicity | Filesystem |
+| T3.5 | Cross-platform signal handling contracts | Signal |
+| T3.6 | Cancellation-safe integration across fs/process/signal | Cross-domain |
+| T3.7 | Deterministic conformance and fault-injection suites | All |
+
+---
+
+## 2. Existing Test Evidence Catalog
+
+### 2.1 Filesystem Tests
+
+| File | Tests | Bead Coverage | Categories |
+|------|-------|--------------|------------|
+| `tests/fs_verification.rs` | 36 | T3.3 | HP, EC, EP |
+| `tests/e2e_fs.rs` | 22 | T3.3 | HP, IX |
+| `tests/tokio_fs_process_signal_conformance_faults.rs` (FS section) | 11 | T3.7 | HP, EP, DT |
+| `tests/tokio_fs_process_signal_conformance.rs` (FS section) | ~10 | T3.7 | HP, DT |
+
+**Total FS tests**: ~79
+
+### 2.2 Process Tests
+
+| File | Tests | Bead Coverage | Categories |
+|------|-------|--------------|------------|
+| `tests/process_lifecycle_hardening.rs` | 38 | T3.4 | HP, EC, EP, DT |
+| `tests/tokio_process_lifecycle_parity.rs` | 36 | T3.4 | HP, EC, CX |
+| `tests/compile_test_process.rs` | 3 | baseline | HP |
+| `tests/tokio_fs_process_signal_conformance_faults.rs` (Process section) | 8 | T3.7 | HP, EP, DT |
+
+**Total Process tests**: ~85
+
+### 2.3 Signal Tests
+
+| File | Tests | Bead Coverage | Categories |
+|------|-------|--------------|------------|
+| `tests/e2e_signal.rs` | 7 | T3.5 | HP, IX |
+| `tests/semantic_signal_quality_contract.rs` | ~6 | T3.5 | HP, DT |
+| `tests/tokio_fs_process_signal_conformance_faults.rs` (Signal section) | 8 | T3.7 | HP, EP, DT |
+
+**Total Signal tests**: ~21
+
+### 2.4 Cross-Domain / Cancellation Tests
+
+| File | Tests | Bead Coverage | Categories |
+|------|-------|--------------|------------|
+| `tests/tokio_cancel_safe_fs_process_signal.rs` | 24 | T3.6 | CX, HP |
+| `tests/tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix.rs` | 36 | T3.1 | DT, IX |
+| `tests/tokio_fs_process_signal_conformance_faults.rs` (Cross section) | 3 | T3.7 | IX |
+
+**Total Cross-domain tests**: ~63
+
+### 2.5 Grand Total
+
+| Domain | Test Count | HP | EC | EP | CX | DT | IX |
+|--------|-----------|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|
+| Filesystem | ~79 | Y | Y | Y | - | Y | Y |
+| Process | ~85 | Y | Y | Y | Y | Y | - |
+| Signal | ~21 | Y | - | Y | - | Y | Y |
+| Cross-domain | ~63 | Y | - | - | Y | Y | Y |
+| **Total** | **~248** | | | | | | |
+
+---
+
+## 3. Coverage Gap Analysis
+
+### 3.1 Identified Gaps
+
+| Gap ID | Domain | Category | Description | Severity |
+|--------|--------|----------|-------------|----------|
+| UTM-G1 | Filesystem | CX | No explicit cancellation tests for FS File operations | Medium |
+| UTM-G2 | Signal | EC | No edge-case tests for SignalKind enumeration boundaries | Low |
+| UTM-G3 | Signal | CX | No cancellation tests for Signal::recv under drop | Medium |
+| UTM-G4 | Process | IX | No process+signal integration (SIGCHLD handling) | Low |
+| UTM-G5 | Filesystem | EC | No boundary tests for very large files or deep paths | Low |
+| UTM-G6 | Cross-domain | CX | No cancel-race between concurrent fs+process+signal | Medium |
+
+### 3.2 Gap Closure Tests (this bead)
+
+| Test ID | Gap | Domain | Category | Assertion |
+|---------|-----|--------|----------|-----------|
+| UTM-01 | UTM-G1 | FS | CX | File::create can be dropped mid-operation safely |
+| UTM-02 | UTM-G1 | FS | CX | File read_to_end cancellation discards partial data |
+| UTM-03 | UTM-G2 | Signal | EC | All SignalKind variants have distinct numeric values |
+| UTM-04 | UTM-G2 | Signal | EC | SignalKind::from_raw roundtrips correctly |
+| UTM-05 | UTM-G3 | Signal | CX | ShutdownReceiver dropped before wait does not leak |
+| UTM-06 | UTM-G3 | Signal | CX | Multiple concurrent receivers resolve independently |
+| UTM-07 | UTM-G4 | Process | IX | Process exit triggers status change visible to try_wait |
+| UTM-08 | UTM-G5 | FS | EC | Empty filename returns appropriate error |
+| UTM-09 | UTM-G5 | FS | EC | Symlink cycle detection or error |
+| UTM-10 | UTM-G6 | Cross | CX | Concurrent fs write + process spawn + shutdown signal |
+
+---
+
+## 4. Enforcement Thresholds
+
+### 4.1 Per-Domain Minimums
+
+| Domain | Minimum Tests | Required Categories | Current | Status |
+|--------|--------------|-------------------|---------|--------|
+| Filesystem | 50 | HP, EC, EP, DT | ~79 | PASS |
+| Process | 50 | HP, EC, EP, CX, DT | ~85 | PASS |
+| Signal | 15 | HP, EP, DT | ~21 | PASS |
+| Cross-domain | 30 | CX, IX | ~63 | PASS |
+
+### 4.2 Category Coverage Requirements
+
+| Category | Min % of total | Required per domain |
+|----------|---------------|-------------------|
+| Happy Path (HP) | 30% | All domains |
+| Error Path (EP) | 15% | FS, Process, Signal |
+| Cancellation (CX) | 10% | Process, Cross-domain |
+| Edge Case (EC) | 10% | FS, Process |
+| Determinism (DT) | 10% | All domains |
+| Integration (IX) | 5% | Cross-domain |
+
+---
+
+## 5. Diagnostic Requirements
+
+### 5.1 Structured Output Fields
+
+All T3 tests must include or support:
+
+| Field | Purpose | Required |
+|-------|---------|----------|
+| Test ID (scenario prefix) | Failure localization | Yes |
+| Bead reference | Ownership tracing | Yes |
+| Category tag | Coverage classification | Yes |
+| Deterministic seed (if applicable) | Reproducibility | When randomized |
+
+### 5.2 CI Artifact Retention
+
+| Artifact | Format | Retention |
+|----------|--------|-----------|
+| Test results | JSON/stdout | 30 days |
+| Coverage report | Per-domain counts | Permanent |
+| Failure logs | Structured text | 90 days |
+
+---
+
+## 6. Determinism Invariants
+
+1. **Coverage monotonicity**: Test count per domain never decreases across commits
+2. **Category completeness**: No domain may lose a coverage category
+3. **Threshold enforcement**: Minimums are hard-fail CI gates
+4. **Bead traceability**: Every test maps to at least one T3 bead
+5. **Gap tracking**: New gaps must be documented before deferral
+6. **Diagnostic completeness**: Failure output always includes test ID and bead reference
+7. **Seed reproducibility**: Randomized tests produce identical results with same seed
+8. **No obligation leaks**: Leak-oracle checks required for CX-category tests
+9. **Error path completeness**: Each public API has at least one EP test
+10. **Cross-domain isolation**: Domain fault does not cascade to other domain tests
+
+---
+
+## 7. Artifact Summary
+
+| Artifact | Format | Purpose |
+|----------|--------|---------|
+| `docs/tokio_fs_process_signal_unit_test_matrix.md` | Markdown | Coverage matrix, gap analysis, enforcement thresholds |
+| `docs/tokio_fs_process_signal_unit_test_matrix.json` | JSON | Machine-readable matrix with test counts and gap IDs |
+| `tests/tokio_fs_process_signal_unit_test_matrix.rs` | Rust | Gap closure tests + coverage enforcement assertions |
+
+---
+
+## 8. Cross-References
+
+- Parity matrix: `docs/tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix.md`
+- T3.3 evidence: `tests/fs_verification.rs`, `tests/e2e_fs.rs`
+- T3.5 evidence: `tests/e2e_signal.rs`
+- T3.6 evidence: `tests/tokio_cancel_safe_fs_process_signal.rs`
+- T3.7 evidence: `tests/tokio_fs_process_signal_conformance_faults.rs`
+- Process lifecycle: `tests/process_lifecycle_hardening.rs`
+- Cancel-safety: `docs/tokio_cancel_safe_fs_process_signal.md`
